name: Successful Communication to a Malicious Website
notes: This rule triggers when a successful communication to a malicious website has been made.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Proxy Servers, BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept
when any of Web Category (custom) are contained in any of Malicious Web Categories - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Successful Communication to a Malicious Website on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Proxy Servers, BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Accept
AND when any of Web Category (custom) are contained in any of Malicious Web Categories - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: Successful Communication to a Malicious Website
Event description: A successful communication to a malicious website has been made.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
